data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for roll-up analytics by parent account.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of roll-up analytics by parent account, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for roll-up analytics, yet no API reads or persisted state checks are included to confirm its implementation. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the lack of necessary evidence to assert either satisfaction or failure of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of roll-up analytics by parent account.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for roll-up analytics
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API returns the expected roll-up analytics for the specified parent account.
